dj_text: Late night transition. Hæld Op → Langt Væk Fra Vestegnen. Down to the final track after this one.
commercial_text: Are you still listening? Good. Don't touch that dial. Or do. We literally can't stop you. You're in control.
hijack_text: You're listening to Smooth Jazz FM from Dimension K-7. Mmm.
recovery_text: HOW are they on our frequency?! That dimension doesn't even HAVE frequencies!
title: Langt Væk Fra Vestegnen
